coreMeaning.en: plural of misapplication; incorrect or inappropriate uses
used incorrectly or inappropriately (past tense of misapply)
to use or apply something incorrectly or inappropriately
to fail to understand something correctly; to misunderstand

to use dishonestly or illegally for one's own purposes; to embezzle

the dishonest or illegal use of funds or property entrusted to one's care
the incorrect assignment of a cause, source, or origin to something

the spontaneous loss of a pregnancy; the failure of a plan or system
